subcodes.first_line: O blessed souls! Your letter was perused with the utmost care. From the praiseworthy endeavours [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها النفوس المبارکه نامه شما بدقت تمام ملاحظه گردید از مساعی حمیده و همم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @Hands of the Cause, @methods of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @past, present and future of Iran
